segments.text: Landing a KO looks really tough here
segments.original_text: 撃墜を通すとなると難しそうに見えます

segments.text: When it comes to securing KOs in neutral
segments.original_text: 立ち回りで撃墜するってなると

segments.text: Like this, basically his only option is landing combos
segments.original_text: こんな感じでコンボを当てるしかほぼなくて

segments.text: And now here a slight mistake happens
segments.original_text: さあここはちょっとミスが出て

full_text: Landing a KO looks really tough here. Leo. When it comes to securing KOs in neutral, like this, basically his only option is landing combos. Yeah, exactly. And now here a slight mistake happens
